title: Old Walking Animaton
description: Brings back the walking animation from the Indev days of MC
body:
# Old Walking Animation

Feeling nostalgic? Then this mod is for you. This mod brings back the derpy walk cycle that caused your arms to flail around when you walk for all players. This is a client cosmetic mod, meaning that if you install it this effect will be applied to all players.

This is a very simple mod and should work with future versions of MC

Features:
Adds the indev derpy walk cycle for all player characters (Togglable in the config)
Adds a disabled by default option to enable the walk cycle for humanoid mobs

Requires [Fabric Api](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api) or [Quilted Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl)

Credits: Mod originally created by 5space, he has given permission to me to update and publish this mod.

[Like Forge? Check out the Forge port](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/old-walking-animation-forge-port "Forge Port") made by [db3k](https://www.curseforge.com/members/db3k "db3k")

[Silly discord server](https://discord.gg/tgf "TGForever Discord Server")
